name: Lettuce and Green Bean Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Head lettuce, torn into bite-size pieces
4 cups Green beans, cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first five ingredients in a bowl and set aside.
2. Place the lettuce in a large salad bowl.
3. Pour the hot green beans on top of the lettuce.
4. Pour the onion mixture over the beans.
5. Cook the bacon until crisp, then pour the cooked bacon and drippings over the green beans.
6. Toss lightly to combine everything.
7. Sprinkle the chopped eggs over the top.
